project_type: Next.js 16 app with App Router, React 19, Tailwind CSS 4, TypeScript 5
build_system: Next.js build via bun (npm not available, use bun run build/lint)
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'bun run build' to ensure zero TypeScript/compilation errors. 2. Run 'bun run lint' to ensure zero lint errors.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET mode. Node.js not installed but bun 1.2.14 is available. Use 'bun run build' and 'bun run lint' instead of npm commands. Bun has known worker_threads warning with Next.js (not a build failure). No test runner available.
contribution_requirements: From AGENTS.md: This version of Next.js may have breaking changes. Read docs in node_modules/next/dist/docs/ before writing new code. Heed deprecation notices.
key_patterns: CSS custom properties in globals.css define theme tokens (--background, --foreground, --muted, --border, --card, --accent, --accent-hover). Theme is toggled via html.dark class. ThemeContext uses useSyncExternalStore for localStorage. Layout.tsx has inline script to prevent flash. Tailwind 4 uses @theme inline directive to map CSS vars to Tailwind colors. Components use semantic color classes (bg-background, text-foreground, text-muted, border-border, bg-card). Glass utilities (.glass, .glass-dark, .glass-light) defined in globals.css. Animations defined in globals.css (animate-fade-in, animate-slide-up, animate-scale-in, animate-blur-in). transition-premium utility defined in globals.css.
directory_structure: app/ - Next.js App Router pages and components; app/components/ - reusable client components; app/api/ - API routes; lib/ - utility libraries (iTunes API, recommendations, favorites, personalization); types/ - TypeScript declarations; public/ - static assets
